title: Person
description: A notable person featured in content — top player, coach, or content creator. File: people/{slug}.json. Display name and bio resolved via locales. Avatar image is a sibling file with matching basename (e.g. yang-chen-da-shen.png).

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, lowercase (e.g. 'cn', 'dk', 'kr'). Used for flag display and filtering.

platforms.description: Platform profile URLs keyed by platform name (e.g. bilibili, youtube, weibo, instagram)
